name: Sam Jay
bio: Sam Jay is an American comedian and writer who became the first Black lesbian writer at Saturday Night Live, on staff from 2017 to 2020. Her conversational, observational stand-up anchors the specials 3 in the Morning on Netflix and Salute Me or Shoot Me on HBO. She co-created and co-starred in the HBO late-night series Pause with Sam Jay and the Peacock comedy Bust Down.

timeline.ev: Performs her first stand-up set at age 29
Joins Saturday Night Live writing staff
Debut album Donnas Daughter; Comedy Central Stand-Up Presents half-hour
First Netflix special, 3 in the Morning
Co-creates and stars in HBO's Pause with Sam Jay
HBO special Salute Me or Shoot Me

accolades: First Black lesbian writer at Saturday Night Live
Two-time Emmy nominee for writing on Saturday Night Live
WGA Award nominee for Saturday Night Live
